description_long: This object is a pair of over-ear headphones with a built-in microphone and a long, attached cable terminating in a standard audio jack. The headband is padded and covered in a dark material, likely synthetic leather, with visible stitching along the top. The ear cups are large, cushioned, and appear to be made of the same material as the headband, providing comfort for extended use. The microphone is mounted on a flexible boom extending from one side of the headphones, allowing for adjustable positioning. The cable is relatively thick and durable, designed to withstand frequent movement and handling. The overall design is robust and utilitarian, suitable for communication or audio monitoring in urban environments.
description: A pair of over-ear headphones with a padded headband, cushioned ear cups, a flexible boom microphone, and a long audio cable.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the padded headband and the cable extending from one ear cup.
description_view_1: Front view displaying both ear cups, the headband's inner padding, and the full length of the microphone boom.
description_view_2: Side view highlighting the thickness of the ear cup and the cable attachment point.
description_view_3: Rear angled view showing the back of the headband and the microphone boom extending forward.
